creator: gedas@tdd.lt
text:
Unfortunately, I didn't have a chance to try never driver. Because we had
to put the system in production we had to install linux. 

This PR can be closed.

Gediminas


On Mon, 14 Aug 2000 johan@FreeBSD.org wrote:

> Synopsis: cy driver is outdated
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: johan
> State-Changed-When: Mon Aug 14 05:48:07 PDT 2000
> State-Changed-Why: 
> Is this still a problem in more recent version of FreeBSD?
> 
> Also did you ever try the Cyclades driver and if so did it work
> correctly?
> 
> Please let us know wheter this is still a problem or not by
> sending mail to 'FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.ORG'
> preserving the subject of this mail.
> 
> Thanks
> 
>
